name: finish_branch
desc: Branch agent self-terminator. Call this LAST, after applying all changes, to set the result summary, close the tool window, and return control to the parent chat which will auto-resume. Only available inside branch sessions (Parameter Editor, Drawing Exporter).

parameters.name: windowType
parameters.description: The window this branch is running inside. Must match the handoff TargetContext. Valid values: 'ParameterEditor', 'DrawingExporter'.

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: One-sentence past-tense summary of what was done. This is what the parent chat receives as the branch result. Example: 'Updated Checked By to Jordan James on 12 drainage sheets.'
